Class NutritionPlanner

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.social.sports.NutritionPlanner
public final class NutritionPlanner extends Object
Provides mathematical methods for athlete nutrition planning and metabolic analysis. Includes BMR and TDEE calculations using the Mifflin-St Jeor equation.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description

    NutritionPlanner.ActivityLevel

    static final record 
    NutritionPlanner.MacroTargets

    static final record 
    NutritionPlanner.MealTiming
    Optimized meal schedule relative to training.

    NutritionPlanner.TrainingPhase
    Training cycle phases for nutrient adjustment.
